## Test plan

- [ ] `npm run ci`
- [ ] `npm run demo`, if report text, scoring, labels, or summaries changed
- [ ] `npm run release:check`, if preparing a release tag

## Maintenance impact

- [ ] Runtime source changes include updated `dist/` output, if runtime code changed
- [ ] Public inputs, outputs, finding IDs, report JSON shape, examples, and docs are updated together, if public surface changed
- [ ] New best-effort failures are surfaced through runtime diagnostics, if this PR adds any
- [ ] Release or process changes are reflected in `docs/MAINTENANCE.md`, if applicable
